rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (8/10) and surface the same substantive strengths (AI-agent infrastructure, distributed high-throughput systems, staff-level leadership) and the same three concerns (no explicit Python, no on-call/incident specifics, technical strategy at scale not overtly highlighted).
